title: ligularia leveillei
intro: Ligularia leveillei, also known as Levier's ligularia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Ligularia leveillei include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating gastrointestinal issues, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system support. Traditional herbal preparations involve the plant's rhizome and roots being dried, powdered, and used in infusions, decoctions, or applied topically as a paste to harness its medicinal properties.
